must_detect.matched_text: To: Board Risk Committee, Seri Nusa Berhad (the Company); From: Legal & Compliance; Subject: PDPA and MNPI handling for financing and HR updates.

To: Board Risk Committee, Seri Nusa Berhad (the Company); From: Legal & Compliance; Subject: PDPA and MNPI handling for financing and HR updates.
The conditional term sheet with Kelana Capital Sdn Bhd for a revolving facility was executed on 2 May 2025 and announced via Bursa LINK the same day; accordingly, this memo contains no undisclosed price-sensitive information under Bursa LR 9.03.
Reference to the non-binding MOU with Rimba Kencana Holdings Berhad remains based on the public announcement dated 12 March 2025 and does not constitute MNPI under the CMSA.
For PDPA purposes, avoid including direct identifiers in internal circulation; generic form labels such as "NRIC/Passport No." or "Bank Account No." appear in templates but must be left blank or masked in drafts (e.g., NRIC: XX-XXXX-XX-XXXX; Account: 1234-XXXX-0000).
Role mailboxes should be used for submissions (e.g., hr.records@serinusa.example), and no personal emails are to be attached to board packs.
Closed period reminders: no director or principal officer dealing is contemplated here, and any references to "insider list" are generic housekeeping for compliance under Paragraph 14 of the Listing Requirements.
Positive PDPA caution — one incident log entry below contains multiple weak identifiers relating to a single contractor for audit traceability: logistics unit casual worker, date of birth 1991-08-11, central-east depot assignment, device asset tag SNB-LG-TA-9F2A, temporary payroll ID TMP-22194, and access pass code HUB-EAST-24.
Outside that single log entry, demographic descriptors in this pack (e.g., age band 30–39, urban central region, shift-based role) are non-identifying and should not be treated as personal data on their own.
The financing timeline, covenant placeholders, and drawdown mechanics herein are high-level and reflect already-announced terms; no undisclosed pricing, financial ratios, or asset disposals are included.
Employment papering (probation confirmations and standard NDAs) uses model clauses compliant with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 and does not request sensitive personal data beyond optional emergency contact fields.
Any mention of "CDS account" refers to public, previously disclosed director data fields in the annual report, not to any new account details (example format shown: CDS 000-0000000-00).
Procurement onboarding for the warehousing software vendor, Datarasa Solutions Sdn Bhd, is at RFP stage only; no binding commitment, exclusivity, or pricing is included in this pack.
For avoidance of doubt, risk terms such as "insider", "leak", or "material event" in this note are generic compliance terminology and do not indicate the existence of any undisclosed proposal or selective briefing.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
